auth-gated route -> Path C authenticated measurement (see lighthouse evidence); a11y contracts unit-tested

environment.git_commit: feat/pg-191 (final feature commit — impl 80f2f6e7d + review fixes + evidence)

notes: Delta/refactor: replaced the /tasks/task-settings stub with a real per-tenant settings form (due-date offset, reminder defaults, task templates) on the PG-178 singleton module-settings pattern. codex-review gate is NON-FUNCTIONAL on this host (codex-cli 0.79.0 rejects --ephemeral -> SKIPPED_PRECONDITION exit 0); COMPENSATED with adversarial backend-architect + frontend-lead subagent reviews of the committed diff (3 real web findings found+fixed: in-flight-save race, keyboard-editable disabled reminder field, all-or-nothing server-parse wiping valid templates). See docs/operations/sprint-18-pg-191-session-issues-log.md. The full pre-ship (integration/coverage/build) runs under the fleet gate-lock (shared test DB serialization).
spec_session_consensus: UNANIMOUS — 3/3 (backend-architect, test-engineer, a11y-expert) with mandatory codebase exploration; all challenges (RLS-in-migration, app-router smoke wiring, EmptyState, per-field a11y, no container.ts) folded into the spec.
